name: Electrician (Bijli Mistri)
description: Wiring, board fitting, fan repair, light installation, short circuit fixes, and other electrical appliances repairing.
scope_of_work: Light and fan fitting, switches repair, fuse or MCB replacement, inverter checkup, water motor pump repair. Material/parts costing is extra.

name: Plumber (Nal Saaz)
description: Leaky tap fixes, pipe fitting, water tank repair, washbasin/toilet installation, blockage clearance, and sanitization services.
scope_id: Tap replacement, leakage inspection, pipeline layout install, toilet flush system repair, drain block clearing. Fittings charges extra.

name: Carpenter (Badhai)
description: Furniture repairs, door/window fitting, latch/lock installations, table or chair fixing, modular kitchen alignment.
scope_of_work: Door alignment, new locks installation, handle replacement, drawer runner fixing, hinges lubrication. Wood and hardware parts costs extra.

name: Painter (Rangsaaz)
description: Wall painting, patch touch-ups, wall putty application, door polishing, and wall waterproofing.
scope_of_work: Interior/exterior single wall coating, damp repair, wood/iron paint, putty application. Paint material must be provided by the customer or purchased at extra cost.

name: Cleaner (Safai)
description: Deep home cleaning, bathroom cleaning, kitchen degreasing, sofa and carpet dry cleaning.
scope_of_work: Bathroom tiles scrubbing, kitchen sink and rack deep cleaning, window panes dusting, vacuuming. Cleaning chemicals brought by worker.
